title: Evidence source adapter
description: A declarative manifest for an INTERNAL evidence source the maintainer/agent may consult through the evidence ladder. The sarf/nahw skills reference adapters GENERICALLY ('use available source adapters'); they never name a specific external service and never depend on any one being present. No adapter's content is ever public — public hover/entry records stay {src:'qamus',kind:'authored',lang:'en'}.

name.description: adapter id (e.g. tafsir_mcp, qac, quran_com, tanzil)

evidence_role.description: what kind of internal evidence it provides

endpoint_env.description: ENV var holding the endpoint/path (no secret committed)

tool.description: the Fusha tool/client that wraps this access

public_exposable.description: adapter content is INTERNAL evidence only — never shipped

required_by_skills.description: skills must NOT depend on this adapter; it is optional evidence

ladder_rank.description: position in the evidence ladder (lower = higher authority); Qamus entry stays rank 1, no adapter outranks it
